goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Accept T064-T068: recipe filters/details, chronological demand, persisted skipped/cancelled and derived cooked states, expiry context, unchanged responsive browser behavior, 347 tests, static/OpenAPI gates, isolated build, disposable migrations, and integrity all pass. The remaining coherent slice is explainable grocery formula and rich explicit purchased intake; cooking UI remains later.

worker_package.objective: Complete grocery and purchased intake without reopening proven work: missing/all generation; no-double-count recipe/staple/manual-extra/Pantry/purchased coverage formula; preserved overrides and uncertainty; covered/ignore/inaccurate/reset/Open Pantry controls; explicit unsupported substitution where no seam exists; rich idempotent partial/complete intake with full batch fields and attribution.
verify: Record all pre-hashes and protect recipe/planner/inventory/concurrent work.
Use existing schema or minimum additive 0026 only; never edit applied migrations.
Prove max(0, max(recipe requirement, active staple target) + manual extra - usable Pantry - purchased/covered) in one compatible unit with no double counting.
Prove missing/all, covered, uncertain, exclusions, overrides, regeneration, controls, and rich idempotent partial/complete intake across unit/service/API tests.
Run scoped/full static/tests/OpenAPI, isolated webpack build, new 390/768/1280 Playwright, unchanged workflow and recipe/planner oracles, disposable DB, port/hash/diff integrity.
stop_if: Existing schema plus one small additive migration cannot represent truthful durable controls/coverage or applied migration would change.
Formula double-counts, merges incompatible units/products, counts excluded batches, or invents exact uncertainty.
Overrides/extras cannot survive regeneration or purchase state creates inventory without explicit confirmation.
Origin, ActorContext, profiles-not-auth, atomicity, idempotency, or operation-key behavior weakens.
Substitution requires a new model; omit with explicit unsupported state.
Cooking/Nutrition/inventory/recipe redesign/outside files/live/shared/secrets/provider/normal DB are required.

evidence: T068 proves the accepted recipe/planner milestone and all full gates.
Current grocery generation emits recipe shortages only and lacks staple/manual-extra/purchased coverage controls.
Products and batches already hold most staple, package, price, store/source, date, note, and exclusion fields.
Existing intake is atomic/idempotent but UI and coverage persistence are narrow.

parallel_safety.rationale: Formula persistence, regeneration, controls, intake, UI, migration, and verification are coupled.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
